title: Advanced Conditionals
summary: Use mixed and advanced conditionals to connect unreal past and present situations.
structure: If + past perfect, would + base verb
If + past simple, would have + past participle
examples: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.
If he were more careful, he would not have made that mistake.
Had I known, I would have acted differently.
common_mistakes: Using standard conditionals where a mixed meaning is needed.
Forgetting inversion in formal mixed conditionals.
